member.name: T:SealWebServer.Controllers.NamespaceDoc
member.summary: Seal Web Server Controllers Objects

member.name: T:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController
member.summary: Main Controller of the Web Report Server

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.Translate(System.String)
member.summary: Translate text using the current Repository Locale

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.Main(System.String)
member.summary: Main entry of the Controller

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.ActionExecuteReport(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Execute a report initiated in a previous execution

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.ActionNavigate(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Navigate to a new report execution: Either for Drill or SubReport

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.ActionGetNavigationLinks(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Return the current Navigation links for a report execution

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.ActionRefreshReport(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Refresh the report for a report execution

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.Result(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Return the Result of a report execution

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.OutputResult(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Return the result output of a report execution

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.ActionCancelReport(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Cancel a report execution

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.ActionUpdateViewParameter(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Update the value of a view parameter of a report execution

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.ViewResult(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Return the result of a report execution for a given format

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.HtmlResultFile(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Return the Html result of a report execution as a file

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.ActionGetTableData(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Return the table data of a Page (for DataTables server Pagination)

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.ActionUpdateEnumValues(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Update values chosen for an Enum in a report execution

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.ActionGetEnumValues(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Return the list of values for a Enumerated list with a filter for a report execution

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.ActionExecuteFromTrigger(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Execute a report and parse the views involved when triggered from a Restrictions View

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.ActionExecuteFromTriggerNewWindow(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Execute a report in a new window when triggered from a Restrictions View

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.resolveShortcut(System.String,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Resolves a shortcut file (.srln) to its target repository path. Sets effectiveRight to min(shortcut folder right, target folder right). Throws if the shortcut is broken, points to another shortcut, or the user has no right on either side.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.fillShortcut(Seal.Model.SWIFolder,System.String,Seal.Model.SWIFile)
member.summary: Fills a SWIFile representing a shortcut (.srln) with the resolved target metadata for display. Does not throw: a shortcut that cannot be resolved is flagged as broken.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWILogin(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Start a session with the Web Report Server using the user name, password, token (may be optional according to the authentication configured on the server) and returns information of the logged user (SWIUserProfile).

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWICheckSecurityCode(System.String)
member.summary: Check the security code for a 2 factors authentication

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWIResetPassword(System.String)
member.summary: Reset a user password

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWIResetPassword2(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Re-init a user password from a reset password link

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWIChangePassword(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Change a user password

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWIGetRootMenu(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the menu of the logged user.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWIGetRootFolders(System.String)
member.summary: Returns all the folders of the user (including Personal folders).

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWIGetFolderDetail(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns the list of file names and details contained in a folder.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWISearch(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns the list of file names and details matching a search in the repository.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWIDeleteFolder(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Delete a sub-folder in the repository. The folder must be empty.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWICreateFolder(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Create a sub-folder in the repository.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWIRenameFolder(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Rename a sub-folder in the repository.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWIGetReportDetail(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns the views and outputs of a report.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWIDeleteFiles(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Delete files or reports from the repository.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWIEmptyRecycleBin(System.String)
member.summary: Empty the current user's recycle bin: permanently delete all items it contains.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWIMoveFile(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Move a file or a report in the repository.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWICreateShortcut(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Create a shortcut (.srln) in a folder referencing a source report or file.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWExecuteReportToResult(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Execute a report into a report result and returns the result. Check API of Seal Web Interface for more information.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWExecuteReport(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Boolean},System.String)
member.summary: Execute a report and returns the report html display result content (e.g. html with prompted restrictions). Check API of Seal Web Interface for more information.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWViewFile(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: View a file published in the repository.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWUploadFile(System.String)
member.summary: Upload a file in a repository folder.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWMarkFavorite(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Mark/Unmark report as favorite.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWIRemoveRecentReport(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Remove a report from the recent reports list.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWIRenameFavoriteReport(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Rename the personal display label of a favorite report. Only the entry stored in the user's profile is changed; the underlying report file is not modified.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWILogout(System.String)
member.summary: Clear the current user session.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWISetUserProfile(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String[],System.String)
member.summary: Set the culture for the logged user.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWIGetUserProfile(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the profile information of the logged user.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWIGetCultures
member.summary: Return the list of Cultures available

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWITranslate(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Translate a text either from the public translations or the repository translations. If the optional parameter instance is not empty, the repository translations are used.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWIClearAIAgent(System.String)
member.summary: Clears the AI Agent conversation history stored in the current session.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWIRewindAIAgent(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Rewinds the current AI Agent conversation to just before the selected user turn: removes that user message and everything after it from the session history. Returns the removed user message text so the caller can re-populate the input box.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWIGetAIAgentSamplePrompts(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the list of sample prompts defined for the current session's AI Agent. Falls back to the default agent configuration when no conversation has started yet.

member.name: P:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.CurrentAgentGUID
member.summary: Returns the GUID of the currently active agent without creating an instance. Respects the user-selected GUID stored in ; falls back to the first agent in the user's security group.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.GetAgentSubFolder(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the full path to one of the _Agents/{GUID} sub-folders (Recents or Favorites) for the current user and the currently active agent, creating it on demand.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SAISaveAgentChat(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Saves the current agent conversation (taken from the server session) to a file in _Agents/{GUID}/Recents. Old entries beyond are pruned (oldest-first).
member.param: Human-readable chat name used as the file name.
JSON-serialised array of StringPair objects (Type, Name, Description, Instance …).

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SAIGetAgentChats(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the list of saved chat sessions from _Agents/{GUID}/Recents and _Agents/{GUID}/Favorites for the current user and currently active agent.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SAIMarkAgentChatFavorite(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Toggles the favorite status of a saved chat session. If the file is in Recents it is moved (copied) to Favorites, and vice-versa. The original file is removed after a successful copy.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SAILoadAgentChat(System.String,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Loads a chat-session file and returns its raw so the client can replay the conversation history.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SAIDeleteAgentChat(System.String,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Deletes a saved chat session from Recents or Favorites.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SAIRenameAgentChat(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Renames a saved chat session within its current folder (Recents or Favorites).

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWIGetUserAgents(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the list of AI Agents available to the current user (from their security group AgentGUIDs), together with the currently selected agent GUID.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWISelectAgent(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Selects an AI Agent for the current session by GUID. The GUID must belong to one of the agents allowed for the user. Clears the active session agent so the next request picks up the new configuration.

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWIGetAIAgentResponse(System.String,System.String)
M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWICancelAIAgentResponse(System.String)
member.summary: Signals the in-progress AI chat call for this session to stop at the next safe iteration boundary (i.e. sets the flag that checks between tool-call iterations).

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.HomeController.SWIGetVersions
member.summary: Returns the version of the Seal Web Interface and the version of the Seal Library.

member.name: T:SealWebServer.Controllers.WebHelper
member.summary: Helper to log messages from the HomeController

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.WebHelper.WriteWebException(System.Exception,System.String)
member.summary: Log an Exception

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.WebHelper.WriteLogEntryWeb(System.Diagnostics.EventLogEntryType,System.String)
member.summary: Log a message with optional parameters

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.WebHelper.WriteLogEntryWebDetail(System.Diagnostics.EventLogEntryType,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Log a message with a detail

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Controllers.WebHelper.WriteLogEntryWebDebug(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Log a debug message with a detail

member.name: P:SealWebServer.Models.Configuration.Authentication.Enabled
member.summary: Whether to enable the configuration

member.name: P:SealWebServer.Models.Configuration.Authentication.Unique
member.summary: If true, only this authentication is enabled

member.name: M:SealWebServer.Models.Configuration.Authentication.IsUnique
member.summary: Returns True if only this authentication is proposed

member.name: P:SealWebServer.Models.Configuration.Authentication.HideLoginPassword
member.summary: If true, the Login Password fields are hidden (e.g. for Integrated Windows Authentication)
